summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was provided or inferred. #90986 is routed to central security handling. #91132, #91203, and #91222 were hydrated but require maintainer/proof/merge-state judgment before any mutation. The remaining listed candidates were not safely classifiable because the preflight artifact hit GitHub API rate limits and has no live kind or updated_at for them.
